all.en: This service level agreement is between the provider and the customer.
all.zh: 本服務水準協議由服務提供者與客戶共同訂立。

all.en: It defines the performance standards expected from the cloud service.
all.zh: 本協議定義雲端服務應達成的效能標準。

all.en: The agreement takes effect on the date of subscription activation.
all.zh: 本協議自訂閱啟用日起生效。

all.en: Monthly uptime is committed at ninety nine point nine percent or higher.
all.zh: 月度可用率承諾為百分之九十九點九或更高。

all.en: Uptime is calculated based on total minutes within each calendar month.
all.zh: 可用率以每曆月總分鐘數為基礎計算。

all.en: Scheduled maintenance windows are excluded from uptime calculations.
all.zh: 排定的維護時段不納入可用率計算。

all.en: Maintenance notifications will be sent at least seventy two hours in advance.
all.zh: 維護通知將於至少七十二小時前發出。

all.en: Critical incidents are defined as full service unavailability.
all.zh: 重大事件定義為服務完全無法使用。

all.en: Response time for critical incidents is within fifteen minutes.
all.zh: 重大事件的回應時間為十五分鐘以內。

all.en: Resolution targets vary by severity level and complexity of the issue.
all.zh: 解決目標依事件嚴重等級與複雜度而有所不同。

all.en: Severity one issues are targeted for resolution within four hours.
all.zh: 嚴重等級一的事件目標於四小時內解決。

all.en: Severity two issues are targeted for resolution within one business day.
all.zh: 嚴重等級二的事件目標於一個工作日內解決。

all.en: Service credits apply if monthly uptime falls below the committed level.
all.zh: 若月度可用率低於承諾標準將適用服務點數補償。

all.en: Credits range from ten percent to fifty percent of monthly fees.
all.zh: 補償點數金額為月費的百分之十至百分之五十。

all.en: Customers must submit credit requests within thirty days of the incident.
all.zh: 客戶須於事件發生後三十天內提出補償申請。

all.en: Service credits are the exclusive remedy for missed performance targets.
all.zh: 服務點數為未達效能目標的唯一補償方式。

all.en: Force majeure events are excluded from service level calculations.
all.zh: 不可抗力事件不納入服務水準計算。

all.en: Examples include natural disasters and major internet outages.
all.zh: 範例包含自然災害與重大網路中斷。

all.en: The provider will maintain detailed incident reports for each event.
all.zh: 服務提供者將為每次事件維護詳細事件報告。

all.en: Post incident reviews are shared with customers upon request.
all.zh: 事件後檢討依需求與客戶分享。

all.en: Performance reports are published monthly on the customer portal.
all.zh: 效能報告每月於客戶入口網站發佈。

all.en: Either party may request a service level review on a quarterly basis.
all.zh: 任一方均可每季要求進行服務水準檢討。

all.en: Changes to the service level agreement require written mutual consent.
all.zh: 服務水準協議的變更需經雙方書面同意。

all.en: This excerpt summarizes only the key provisions of the full document.
all.zh: 本摘錄僅總結完整文件的關鍵條款。

all.en: Customers should refer to the full agreement for definitive terms and conditions.
all.zh: 客戶應參閱完整協議以瞭解最終的條款與條件。

all.en: Disaster recovery provisions guarantee restoration of service within four hours.
all.zh: 災難復原條款保證於四小時內恢復服務。

all.en: Data backups are performed every six hours and stored across three geographic regions.
all.zh: 資料備份每六小時執行一次，並分散儲存於三個地理區域。

all.en: Security incidents will be reported to the customer within twenty four hours of detection.
all.zh: 安全事件將於偵測後二十四小時內向客戶通報。

all.en: Annual penetration testing reports are made available to authorized customer representatives.
all.zh: 年度滲透測試報告可提供予獲授權之客戶代表查閱。

all.en: The provider maintains relevant industry certifications and audits these annually.
all.zh: 服務提供者持有相關產業認證並進行年度稽核。

all.en: Customers receive at least ninety days notice prior to any material change in service scope.
all.zh: 服務範圍若有重大變更，客戶將獲至少九十天的事前通知。

all.en: Dispute resolution will follow a defined escalation path before formal arbitration.
all.zh: 爭議解決將遵循既定的逐級陳報路徑後方進入正式仲裁。

all.en: Both parties agree to act in good faith to resolve any service performance issues.
all.zh: 雙方同意以誠信原則處理任何服務效能議題。

all.en: This agreement reflects our shared commitment to delivering reliable, secure cloud services.
all.zh: 本協議反映我們共同致力於提供可靠、安全雲端服務的承諾。

all.en: Customer technical contacts will receive proactive alerts for any planned configuration changes.
all.zh: 任何計畫性組態變更，客戶技術聯絡人均將收到主動告警。

all.en: Quarterly business reviews will include uptime trends, support metrics, and roadmap previews.
all.zh: 季度業務檢討將包含可用率趨勢、支援指標與路線圖預覽。

all.en: Capacity planning data is available to enterprise customers upon written request.
all.zh: 企業客戶可於書面申請後取得產能規劃資料。

all.en: Service decommissioning notices will be provided no less than 12 months in advance.
all.zh: 服務退場通知將於至少十二個月前提供。

all.en: Multi-region failover configurations are recommended for mission critical workloads.
all.zh: 建議任務關鍵型工作負載採用多區域容錯移轉組態。

all.en: Customers retain ownership of all data uploaded to the service at all times.
all.zh: 客戶始終保有所有上傳至本服務之資料的所有權。

all.en: Data export tools allow customers to retrieve their information in industry standard formats.
all.zh: 資料匯出工具可讓客戶以業界標準格式取回其資訊。

all.en: Subprocessor changes will be communicated through the trust portal at least 30 days in advance.
all.zh: 次處理者變更將透過信任入口於至少三十天前通知。

all.en: Service level credits do not apply when issues arise from customer misconfiguration.
all.zh: 因客戶錯誤組態造成的問題不適用服務水準補償。

all.en: Both parties acknowledge this agreement supersedes prior service level commitments in writing.
all.zh: 雙方確認本協議優先於先前以書面訂立的服務水準承諾。
